overview: Natsuki, the son's daughter-in-law who brings a man and acts unfaithful while his son is away. But I can't tell my son about it. Because I also had a relationship with Natsuki ... That's because Natsuki has tempted me by showing me masturbation, showing me a blowjob with a man in the parking lot, and showing SEX with an affair partner in the couple's bedroom ...
